suite.name: Tests

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "webkit", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\Landing\\Desktop\\docDev\\robotClaude\\front-back\\rf_tests\\browser\\traces\\temp\\476b54ed-9d01-4d50-9430-f1a072e4746b"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.saucedemo.com
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

test.name: TC_001 — Connexion avec un utilisateur verrouillé

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Given Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'locked_out_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then Login Should Fail With Locked Error
Login Error Message Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="error"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Login Error Should Contain Locked Message
Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

test.name: TC_002 — Tri des produits par prix croissant

kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Go To

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: And Inventory Page Should Be Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="inventory-container"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) lohi by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element css=[data-test="product-sort-container"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then Products Are Sorted By Price Low To High
First Product Price Should Be Lower Than Last
Get Text
kw.msg:
Error: locator.elementHandle: Error: strict mode violation: locator('[data-test="inventory-item-price"]:first-of-type') resolved to 6 elements: 1)
$7.99
aka getByText('$7.99') 2)
$9.99
aka getByText('$9.99') 3)
$15.99
aka locator('[data-test="inventory-item-price"]').nth(2) 4)
$15.99
aka locator('[data-test="inventory-item-price"]').nth(3) 5)
$29.99
aka getByText('$29.99') 6)
$49.99
aka getByText('$49.99') Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-test="inventory-item-price"]:first-of-type')
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: When Click First Product Name
Click
kw.msg:
Error: locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator('[data-test="inventory-item-name"]:first-of-type') resolved to 6 elements: 1)
Sauce Labs Backpack
aka locator('[data-test="item-4-title-link"]') 2)
Sauce Labs Bike Light
aka locator('[data-test="item-0-title-link"]') 3)
Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt
aka locator('[data-test="item-1-title-link"]') 4)
Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket
aka locator('[data-test="item-5-title-link"]') 5)
Sauce Labs Onesie
aka locator('[data-test="item-2-title-link"]') 6)
Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)
aka locator('[data-test="item-3-title-link"]') Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-test="inventory-item-name"]:first-of-type')

suite.doc: Saucedemo test suite covering login, cart, checkout, sorting, logout and product detail
